raw_consumer_statement:
In regards to Dispute XXXX, American Express needs to refund my credit card charge of {$2500.00} back to my credit card ending in XXXX. I am the homeowner of XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX, I know who is working on my home. The builder ( XXXX XXXX ) finalized the electrical work, not XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ) never touched our home to perform electrical work. He fraudulently charged my card {$10.00} to see if it would go through, before charging {$2500.00}. He claimed he did electrical work but he never did. That is fraud. I never signed a contract with this electrician. I never authorized any of these charges. 

I filed a Police Report for theft of services, performed Release of Contractor with the City of XXXX, inquired with a lawyer to send a Demand Letter, and submitted multiple, valid evidences of this theft.
